paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.58 as of 2026-07-22, representing a decrease of 1.05% from the prior close and 24.28% over the last 21 trading sessions.
There have been no new news headlines in the last 24 hours, but a recent headline from The Globe and Mail reported on the resignation of a Fermi Inc. director amid a governance dispute.

Recent SEC filings include an 8-K/A filing disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and a response letter from Everson, as well as an 8-K filing announcing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There has been one Form 4 filing in the feed.
